calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2022 Continued To Mar-15-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anna Schasker, 628-224-3684, Plaintiff in pro per.
No Other appearances.

Plaintiff did not properly contest the Court's tenative ruling.

The Court makes the following ruling:

DEFENDANT GOVERNOR GAVIN NEWSOM'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is taken under submission.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

**After hearing, an order" sustaining defendant Governor Gavin Newsom's demurrer to complaint" is signed. **

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2022 Continued To Jan-11-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
